title: Change Management- Managing Mindset for Peak Performance
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical change management and peak-performance mindset habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Change Management- Managing Mindset for Peak Performance helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn change management and peak-performance mindset into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through Understand Who You Are, Accept Change, and Positive Mental Attitude so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Getting Yourself and Your Team Ready

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Change Management- Managing Mindset for Peak Performance.md
